translated: Welcome to ProSeka AfterTalk for the "Beyond the Unraveled Threads" event! I'm Rina Honnizumi, the voice of Shizuku Hinomori from MORE MORE JUMP!
It's great to be here.
In this ProSeka AfterTalk, we'll look back on the event story and enjoy the AfterLive together with everyone watching the stream.
This edition covers the "Beyond the Unraveled Threads" event.
The event just finished a moment ago. Everyone, how did you like the story?
I have so many things I want to talk about!
Wasn't it incredible?
So much happened, and I'm planning to dive deep into all of that today.
I hope you'll stick around.
By the way, please post your thoughts on the event or this broadcast using the hashtag #ProSekaAfterTalk.
The staff has set up the YouTube chat so I can see it right here,
so I'll be picking up your comments as we go.
Also, the management team has provided me with a device today,
so I'll use it to look at the story and the illustrations of the featured members with all of you.
For today's AfterLive, I'll be operating the device myself,
and I'm planning to join the same room as you all to watch the show.
So, right before the AfterLive starts, I'll create a Room ID...
I'll set it up so we can all enter at the same time, so...
I'm sure some of you might need to switch devices or get things ready,
so I'd be very happy if you could start preparing for that now.
Thank you for your cooperation.
Now, let's jump right into looking back at the event.
Let's review the story for "Beyond the Unraveled Threads."
I see everyone in the comments saying things like "the entertainment industry is terrifying."
Honestly, I think the way Shizuku faced her own past was just so cool.
I felt this when I first read the script too, but it really depicts the realistic behind-the-scenes side of things.
There were quite a few painful scenes, but Shizuku...
Because she faced those things head-on without running away, we got that kind of ending.
Seeing how the story concluded, I just really want to tell Shizuku she did a great job.
